hooks.command: echo '--- SESSION START ---' && echo 'Loading TASKS.md...' && cat Onara_Vault/TASKS.md || true && echo '' && echo 'Loading code-map...' && cat Onara_Vault/wiki/_code-map.md || true
echo 'RULES: Must follow wiki/_code-map.md + PROJECT_CONTEXT.md + TASKS.md before writing code'
echo 'ACTION REQUIRED: Update TASKS.md + logs/code-changes.md if code was modified'
echo '--- SESSION END ---' && echo 'ACTION REQUIRED: Update TASKS.md + logs/code-changes.md' && echo 'ACTION REQUIRED: logs/code-changes.md must be updated manually or via script'
